name: Apricot Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the dried apricots to a boil in water. Cook until the liquid is absorbed and the apricots are tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain the apricots and stir them into the sieved crumble mixture. You can add about 1/4 cup sliced almonds for texture.
3. Make the All-Purpose Butter Roll using the recipe that came with your bread machine on the dough setting.
4. Roll the dough into a rectangle (12" x 7") and divide it in half if desired.
5. Spread the apricot filling down the center of each dough lengthwise (12").
6. Cut slits about 1 inch apart on either side of the filling, creating 12 strips that crisscross over the filling.
7. Place the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle with the crumb topping and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. Cool slightly before drizzling with confectioners' sugar icing (1 cup powdered sugar mixed with a few tablespoons water).
